notes: No API key is stored here. Configure keys with environment variables only.
auto tries Tavily when TAVILY_API_KEY exists, then Jina when JINA_API_KEY exists, then DuckDuckGo HTML fallback.
All providers are for public web search only. Do not log in, store cookies, or bypass anti-scraping controls.

providers.name: tavily
best_for: research tasks that need concise snippets
providers.notes: Recommended primary provider for goldfish. Default endpoint is https://api.tavily.com/search.

providers.name: jina
providers.notes: Uses s.jina.ai search. Free API keys may be used; no key is written to config.

providers.name: duckduckgo
providers.notes: No key required. Parsing can be less stable than API providers.
